docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY LINCOLN EQUIPMENT INC AS TO DEFENDANT HYDROKLEEN SYSTEM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
